text: i paid 40k a year to learn stuff i could have googled
my roommate microwaved fish every single night freshman year. i still cant smell salmon without gagging
told my group project team i was 'researching' for 3 weeks. i did nothing
professor gave me a C because i 'lacked passion.' sir this is intro to accounting
started my thesis 48 hours before it was due and somehow passed. academia is fake
hallucinated my dead grandma telling me to sleep during an all nighter in the library
the cafeteria mystery meat gave me food poisoning twice and i still went back
my student loans have student loans at this point
walked across the stage at graduation knowing full well i cheated in stats
confessed my love in the high school yearbook. she moved schools that summer
i shower in flip flops to this day because of what i saw in the dorm bathrooms
my advisor forgot my name 4 years in a row lol cool cool cool
spent more on textbooks than rent and opened maybe two of them
the group chat said 'meeting at 7' and nobody showed up. including me
i wrote an entire essay in comic sans to spite my TA and got an A minus
my diploma cost 120k and its in a drawer somewhere under old takeout menus
pulled an all nighter and saw the library chairs breathing. went to bed after that
cafeteria pizza was 90% bread and 10% regret
my high school crush found my deviantart page. i transfered schools mentally
prof said my paper was 'interesting' which is academic for 'what the hell is this'
i owe sallie mae my firstborn at this rate
roomate stole my shampoo for an entire semester and i was too awkward to say anything
lied on my resume about being in a study group. the study group was me crying at dennys
our valedictorian got caught buying their essay online two weeks after graduation lmaooo
i still have nightmares about the communal dorm kitchen sponge
wrote my thesis abstract before writing the thesis. never wrote the thesis
the 3am vending machine ramen was the best meal of my college career and thats sad
my student loan payment is more than my rent. love that for me
tripped going up the stairs at high school graduation in front of 800 people
professor had a breakdown in class and we all just sat there. relatable king honestly
the library printer jammed during finals and three people cried including me
dorm fire alarm at 4am in january wearing nothing but boxers. core memory unlocked
submitted the wrong file for my final and got a zero. it was a meme folder
my group project partner listed 'vibes' as their contribution on the peer review
cafeteria sushi should be classified as a bioweapon
i have a masters degree and i make less than my friend who does hvac
saw god at hour 36 of no sleep during finals week. he said drop out
my hs english teacher read my diary entry poem out loud to the whole class
the dorm laundry room was a warzone. people would throw ur wet clothes on the floor
told everyone i was premed for two years before switching to communications lol
my cap and gown cost $80 for something i wore for 45 minutes. graduation is a scam
all nighter energy drink combo made my heart do a lil dance. not the fun kind
prof curved the exam so hard that my 38 became a B. nobody learned anything
high school me thought fedoras were peak fashion. the photos haunt me
my thesis advisor retired midway through my thesis. just left. iconic tbh
lived off dining hall cereal for a month because i spent my meal plan too fast
student loan interest accruing while i read this lmaoo cant escape
my roommate brought a pet tarantula without asking. i slept in the lounge for a week
turned in a paper with lorem ipsum still in the conclusion. prof didnt notice
the graduation speaker said 'follow your dreams' while we all drowned in debt
studied for the wrong exam and aced a test i didnt need to take
our dorm had a mystery smell for 4 months. turned out to be a forgotten protein shake
i still flinch when i hear a group project mentioned at work
pulled 3 all nighters in a row and started narrating my life in third person
cafeteria grilled cheese was bussin tho ngl. only good thing about that place
my high school band performance is on youtube with 12 views and all of them are me checking if its still up
graduated with honors and my parents still ask when im getting a real job
the RA caught me sneaking in at 3am and we just stared at each other and moved on
my student loans will outlive me and possibly my children
professor called on me when i was clearly sleeping. bro i was in the FOURTH row
wrote half my thesis in a panera bread because my dorm wifi was unusable
someone stole my laundry and i saw them wearing my shirt in class the next day
high school talent show. i rapped. badly. the video resurfaces every thanksgiving
the graduation ceremony was 4 hours long and they mispronounced my name
dorm room was so small i could touch both walls from my bed
all nighter hallucination: my textbook started talking to me. it said 'you should have started earlier'
took out loans for a degree i dont even use. i sell vintage clothes on depop now
my study group met once and spent the whole time complaining about the class
cafeteria lady remembered my name and it was the most seen i felt all semester
prof said 'see me after class' and i simply did not. dropped the course instead
wore my lanyard around my neck freshman year like a tourist at disney world
my graduation photos look like a hostage situation. 120k for that smile
during an all nighter i forgot how to spell 'the.' sat there for five minutes
my hs yearbook quote was a rick roll link. thought i was so clever
roommate had a full drum kit in a shared double. SHARED. DOUBLE.
submitted my thesis one minute before deadline and the wifi cut out. aged 10 years
student loan company calls me more than my own mother does
the professor who ruined my gpa just liked my linkedin post. the audacity
cafeteria chicken gave me trust issues that extend to all poultry
cried in the library bathroom so often they should name a stall after me
told my parents i was studying abroad. i was studying a broad. jk i was just failing
group project: i did 90% and they all got the same grade. communism but worse
high school prom date ditched me for my best friend at the actual prom
my diploma has a typo on it and i paid too much to care anymore
48 hours awake and i started seeing patterns in the ceiling tiles. beautiful honestly
the dorm elevator smelled like a crime scene 24/7 and nobody investigated
paying $500/month for a degree i got in 'interdisciplinary studies' aka idk what i want
my professor plagiarized his own lecture from a youtube video i had already watched
accidentally called my professor mom in front of 200 students. transferred emotionally
graduated during covid so my ceremony was a zoom call. they mailed me the hat
the campus squirrels had more confidence than me during my entire college career
all nighter pro tip: if u start laughing at nothing its time to stop
my meal plan ran out in october. october. of a fall semester
hs gym class rope climb still visits me in my dreams. i never made it up
thesis defense went so bad my advisor apologized to the committee for me
been out of school 5 years and sallie mae texts me like an ex who wont move on
dorm shower pressure was either a gentle mist or a pressure washer. no inbetween
i peaked in high school and its been downhill since 2016
our group study session was 4 hours of tiktok and 10 mins of actual studying
graduated magna cum laude and my first job paid $14/hr. magna cum fraud
